Findings.Description: 198.51.100.0 is performing SSH brute force attacks against i-99999999. Brute force attacks are used to gain unauthorized access to your instance by guessing the SSH password.
Findings.Title: 198.51.100.0 is performing SSH brute force attacks against i-99999999.
